prose:
The frontier molecular orbitals of water were calculated using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level of theory (chemkit tier 'standard') with the PySCF engine. The calculation was performed in the gas phase on the neutral singlet state (charge 0, multiplicity 1). The SCF calculation converged in 7 cycles.

The HOMO energy is -8.6037183 eV.
The LUMO energy is 0.33695037 eV.

No warnings were reported, and the engine's integrity checks passed.
